description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern rifle featuring a vibrant, floral-themed camouflage across its entire body. The stock, handguard, and receiver are all covered in a green base with large, detailed red and pink flowers, giving it a unique and artistic appearance. The rifle has a fixed stock and a curved detachable box magazine, both decorated with the same floral motif. The barrel is standard length and fitted with basic iron sights, with no visible optics or advanced attachments. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all present and appear functional. The overall design blends the utilitarian form of a classic assault rifle with an unexpected, colorful aesthetic.
description: A floral-camouflaged AK-style rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring vibrant green and red flower patterns across its body.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the floral pattern along the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the floral design, fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, showing the stock end and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the opposite side of the rifle, again showcasing the floral pattern, fixed stock, and magazine.
